channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: The deadliest 10 minutes in decades: Lebanese reel from Israeli strikes that killed hundreds - The Guardian
item.description:
1. The deadliest 10 minutes in decades: Lebanese reel from Israeli strikes that killed hundreds  The Guardian
  2. Iran war live: Israeli attacks on Lebanon threaten US-Iran ceasefire talks  Al Jazeera

  4. Israeli military says it has killed nephew of Hezbollah chief Naim Qassem  Reuters
  5. Fight against Hezbollah in Lebanon is IDF’s ‘primary combat zone,’ Zamir says  The Times of Israel

item.title: US-Iran ceasefire under strain ahead of talks - Reuters
item.description:
1. US-Iran ceasefire under strain ahead of talks  Reuters

  4. Iran closes strait, challenges U.S. to rein in Israel: 'the world is watching whether it will act on its commitments'  Fortune
  5. Strait of Hormuz Closure 'Completely Unacceptable' Under Ceasefire, Leavitt Says  Time Magazine

item.title: No Longer Off Limits, the Strait of Hormuz Remains Thorny Politically - The New York Times
item.description:

item.source: Institute for the Study of War

item.title: Islamic Republic marks Khamenei 40th day with burial still unclear - ایران اینترنشنال
